note: Forward calendar of known upcoming events. Uses absolute dates; the board computes how far away each is. Add your own events here any time.

events.title: Wimbledon begins
events.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships run 29 June–12 July 2026 — two weeks of grass-court tennis at SW19.

angles.name: Strawberries and serves
angles.copy: Wimbledon starts today: two weeks of strawberries, impossible queues and at least one British hope to get behind. Who's your pick for the title?

angles.name: It's SW19 season
angles.copy: Grass-court season is here. Wimbledon is back, and so is the national pastime of pretending we understand tennis for a fortnight.

events.title: British Grand Prix at Silverstone
events.blurb: Race day at Silverstone — the British Grand Prix, round 12 of the 2026 F1 season.

angles.name: Lights out at Silverstone
angles.copy: Lights out at Silverstone today — the British Grand Prix, the loudest, fastest weekend on the calendar. Who's taking the win?

events.title: The Open at Royal Birkdale
events.blurb: The 154th Open Championship is held at Royal Birkdale, 16–19 July 2026.

angles.name: The Claret Jug is up
angles.copy: The Open is back, at Royal Birkdale — links golf, coastal winds and the Claret Jug on the line. Four days, one champion.

events.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games open
events.blurb: The Commonwealth Games come to Glasgow, 23 July–2 August 2026 — a home Games for Scotland.

angles.name: Glasgow's moment
angles.copy: It's finally here — the Commonwealth Games come to Glasgow today. Scotland's chance to shine in front of a home crowd. Who are you cheering on?

angles.name: Bring on the medals
angles.copy: Ten sports, one city, a fortnight of action — the Commonwealth Games begin in Glasgow today. Expect noise.

events.title: SQA results day (Scotland)
events.blurb: Scottish exam results (SQA) are released to students on 4 August 2026.

angles.name: Results morning
angles.copy: Big morning across Scotland — SQA results are out. However today goes, there's always a way forward. Sending calm to every student opening that envelope.

events.title: Edinburgh Festival Fringe
events.blurb: The world's biggest arts festival takes over Edinburgh, 7–31 August 2026.

angles.name: The Fringe is back
angles.copy: The world's biggest arts festival takes over Edinburgh from today — three weeks of comedy, theatre and glorious chaos. What are you booking?

events.title: A-level results day
events.blurb: A-level results day in England, Wales and Northern Ireland — 13 August 2026.

angles.name: Whatever the envelope says
angles.copy: A-level results day. Whether it's the grades you wanted or a quick change of plan, it works out — it really does. Good luck to everyone today.

events.title: GCSE results day
events.blurb: GCSE results day in England, Wales and Northern Ireland — 20 August 2026.

angles.name: Deep breath
angles.copy: GCSE results day. Deep breath — these don't define you, there are more routes than ever, and you've already done the hard bit. You've got this.

events.title: Premier League season kicks off
events.blurb: The 2026/27 Premier League season starts on 22 August 2026.

angles.name: Football's back
angles.copy: The wait is over — the Premier League returns today. New season, fresh optimism, and a table nobody can argue with yet. Who's your dark horse?

events.title: Reading & Leeds Festival
events.blurb: Reading & Leeds runs 27–30 August 2026, with headliners including Fontaines D.C., Florence + The Machine, Chase & Status and RAYE.

angles.name: Mud and magic
angles.copy: Reading & Leeds kicks off today — Fontaines D.C., Florence + The Machine, Chase & Status, RAYE and a field full of mud and magic. Who are you there for?

angles.name: Festival soundtrack
angles.copy: Not heading to Reading or Leeds? We've got the line-up on rotation all weekend, no wellies required.

events.title: Notting Hill Carnival turns 60
events.blurb: Notting Hill Carnival takes to the streets on 30–31 August 2026 — its 60th anniversary.

angles.name: Sixty years of Carnival
angles.copy: Notting Hill Carnival hits the streets this weekend — and it's the big 60th. London's loudest, most colourful party. Are you going down?

events.title: August bank holiday
events.blurb: The summer bank holiday Monday in England, Wales and Northern Ireland — 31 August 2026.

angles.name: Last long weekend
angles.copy: Bank holiday Monday — the last big long weekend of the summer. BBQ, beach, or back under the duvet? No wrong answers.

events.title: The Great North Run
events.blurb: The Great North Run — the world's biggest half marathon — runs from Newcastle to South Shields in mid-September.

angles.name: The North East's day
angles.copy: The Great North Run is back — tens of thousands pounding from Newcastle to South Shields. The North East at its proudest and sweatiest. Running, or cheering?
